title: bolboschoenus maritimus var. planiculmis
intro: Bolboschoenus maritimus var. planiculmis, also known as Sea club-rush or Sea club rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Bolboschoenus maritimus var. planiculmis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
